query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "redesign mixture-of-experts routers with manifold power iteration" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it investigates the same core mechanism (Mixture-of-Experts router behavior and constraints) and proposes a foundational geometric framework for modifying these routers, which is directly relevant to a follow-up study on "Redesigning MoE Routers."
